originalTitle: Dozens of bodies, mostly infants, discovered in Kenya mass grave
title: Dozens of bodies, mostly infants, discovered in Kenya mass grave
content: Some of the 32 bodies, including 25 children, are believed to have come from local hospitals and mortuaries.

originalTitle: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
title: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
content: Ghana is the first African country to make such a deal with the EU, the Ghanaian vice-president says.

originalTitle: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
title: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
content: The Egypt forward says Liverpool fans "gave me the best time of my life" and "stood by me in the toughest times".

originalTitle: Belarus’s Lukashenko makes first visit to North Korea in bid to deepen ties
title: Belarus’s Lukashenko makes first visit to North Korea in bid to deepen ties
content: Belarus and North Korea are expected to sign a treaty of friendship as their leaders meet in Pyongyang.

originalTitle: US Democrats condemn war on Iran as Senate resolution fails
title: US Democrats condemn war on Iran as Senate resolution fails
content: The latest war powers resolution in the US Senate to end US attacks on Iran has failed in a 47-53 vote.

originalTitle: Is Iran’s negotiating position stronger than when US-Israeli war started?
title: Is Iran’s negotiating position stronger than when US-Israeli war started?
content: Tehran believes so, and will seek to extract concessions that the US and Gulf nations can't agree to, analysts caution.

originalTitle: 'He liked the fear in our eyes,' Epstein survivors tell BBC
title: 'He liked the fear in our eyes,' Epstein survivors tell BBC
content: In an interview with BBC Newsnight, five women abused by the disgraced financier describe the impact of their shared ordeal.

originalTitle: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903
title: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903
content: The party, which has been in power since 2019, gained the most votes but faces tough talks on forming a new government.

originalTitle: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
title: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
content: The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.

originalTitle: 'It wasn't meant to end like this' - Salah exit tough but inevitable
title: 'It wasn't meant to end like this' - Salah exit tough but inevitable
content: Less than a year ago, Mohamed Salah was sitting on a throne inside Anfield after renewing his contract - so why is he leaving?

originalTitle: £123 for a child's England kit - have prices gone too far?
title: £123 for a child's England kit - have prices gone too far?
content: BBC Sport explores the rise in the cost of kits for the 2026 World Cup, with insights from experts and fans.

originalTitle: Women's game needs more respect with officiating - Bompastor
title: Women's game needs more respect with officiating - Bompastor
content: Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor says the women's game needs "more respect" after her side have a goal controversially disallowed in their Women's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal.
